response.reasoning: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq (April 2025-present) directly involves TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators — a strong match for the AI agent development requirement. Prior Optilyz role used TypeScript, AWS CDK, React, and MongoDB, covering frontend, backend, cloud, and NoSQL. RIDE Capital experience adds Node/TypeScript/GraphQL with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based). Java is listed in skills and used at Altom/National Instruments, though Kotlin is not mentioned. Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly cited, though general testing framework and Node backend expertise is evident. Docker, MongoDB, MySQL, Git, Linux all present. BS in Computer Science satisfies education. Workshops and open-source projects demonstrate communication and craftsmanship.
strengths: Strong current TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience plus AI-agent/MCP work
15+ years experience with TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship culture
Cloud (AWS CDK), containers (Docker/Kubernetes), and MongoDB/SQL all covered
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Vitest not specifically called out (testing background present but framework unclear)
Kotlin not listed; Java present but dated
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior fullstack candidate with directly relevant current work on TypeScript/Node and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), plus a long track record of React, cloud, and database work. Minor gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifics are easily bridgeable given his polyglot background and craftsmanship orientation. Recommended for interview to confirm framework-specific depth.
